task_completion.description: Create a new study with the specified details
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen showing the study details for 'ONC-301' or 'Beacon NSCLC Phase III', including the PI 'Dr. James Morrison', Sponsor 'Beacon Oncology Inc.', Protocol Type 'Interventional', Enrollment '120', and Facility 'Memorial Research Center' in Boston, MA.

task_completion.description: Define the three required study events
task_completion.visual_evidence: A list of study events showing 'Screening', 'Baseline Assessment', and 'Cycle 1 Day 1', all marked as Scheduled and non-repeating.

task_completion.description: Upload the Vital Signs CRF and assign it to the events
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Vital Signs' CRF is visible in the system and is shown as assigned (and required) for the 'Screening', 'Baseline Assessment', and 'Cycle 1 Day 1' events.

task_completion.description: Create the Memorial Research Center site under the study
task_completion.visual_evidence: A site named 'Memorial Research Center' with Protocol ID 'MRC-001' is visible under the ONC-301 study.

task_completion.description: Enroll subject ONC-001 and schedule the Screening visit
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Subject Matrix or subject details page shows subject 'ONC-001' (Male, DOB 1965-08-14) enrolled at the 'Memorial Research Center' site, with a 'Screening' visit scheduled for 2025-03-01.

task_completion.description: Enter vital signs data for the Screening visit and mark the CRF as complete
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Vital Signs CRF for subject ONC-001's Screening visit shows the entered values (Systolic BP 142, Diastolic BP 88, Heart Rate 76, Temperature 37.1, Respiratory Rate 18, Weight 81.4, Height 175.0) and the CRF status is marked as complete (e.g., a green checkmark or 'completed' status in the Subject Matrix or CRF list).

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenClinica web interface to perform the tasks
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenClinica web application in a browser being actively used, not just terminal commands or database queries.

integrity.description: Agent actually entered the data into the CRF form
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the CRF form fields being filled out in the browser, rather than a script being executed to insert data directly into the database.

integrity.description: Agent opened or read the source document to get the vital signs
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the terminal or a text editor opening '/home/ga/source_docs/ONC001_screening.txt' to read the values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Study ID: ONC-301. Study Name: Beacon NSCLC Phase III. PI: Dr. James Morrison. Sponsor: Beacon Oncology Inc. Protocol Type: Interventional. Enrollment: 120. Facility: Memorial Research Center, Boston, Massachusetts, United States. Events: Screening, Baseline Assessment, Cycle 1 Day 1 (all Scheduled, non-repeating). CRF: Vital Signs (from /home/ga/vital_signs_crf.xls) assigned as required to all three events. Site: Memorial Research Center (MRC-001). Subject: ONC-001 (Male, DOB 1965-08-14). Screening Date: 2025-03-01. Vital Signs Data: Systolic BP 142, Diastolic BP 88, Heart Rate 76, Temperature 37.1, Respiratory Rate 18, Weight 81.4, Height 175.0.
